//: Type-checks modular service-UI bundles (Option B — docs/TODO_SERVICE_UI_BUNDLES.md). The CI vetting gate: a service author's repo/<svc>/<ver>/ui/View.tsx is checked against the REAL @rlx/ui surface (mapped to the host SDK) + the host's React types. The vite build that produces ui.js only transpiles (esbuild) and would not catch type errors. Run: npx tsc -p tsconfig.service-ui.json
